channel.title: hashwithharsh — Harsh Yadav
channel.description: DevOps and Cloud Engineering posts by Harsh Yadav. Real problems, real fixes, no fluff.

item.title: Docker Networking: What Nobody Explains Clearly
item.description: I spent 3 hours debugging a container networking issue. Here's everything I learned so you don't have to suffer the same way.
item.author: Harsh Yadav

item.title: Setting Up Kubernetes From Scratch (Without Losing Your Mind)
item.description: kubeadm, flannel, kubectl — a step-by-step of standing up a real k8s cluster on bare metal and understanding what every piece actually does.
item.author: Harsh Yadav

item.title: Terraform + AWS: My First Real Infrastructure as Code
item.description: State files, providers, and the moment I accidentally destroyed my dev environment. Everything I wish someone had told me before I started.
item.author: Harsh Yadav

item.title: Building a Real CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions
item.description: From commit to deployed container in under 3 minutes. A practical walkthrough of a pipeline that actually works in production.
item.author: Harsh Yadav

item.title: Monitoring Your Cluster with Prometheus + Grafana
item.description: Setting up the full observability stack — scraping metrics, writing PromQL queries, and building dashboards you'd actually want to look at.
item.author: Harsh Yadav

item.title: Linux Skills Every DevOps Engineer Actually Needs
item.description: Not a beginner's guide. This is the stuff that separates people who google everything from people who actually understand what's happening under the hood.
item.author: Harsh Yadav
